particulars.description: By way of legal mortgage plot 3 rear of no.7 Balsall street east balsall common. By way of fixed charge the benefit of all covenants and rights concerning the property and plant machinery fixtures fittings furniture equipment implements and utensils the goodwill of any business carried on at the property and the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.
